description: WISDM watch HAR dual-head 1D-CNN. Input is a raw IMU window in physical units; normalization is baked in. Two outputs: 4-way activity softmax + binary real-vs-junk detector.

input.note: Feed 20 Hz samples (downsample the watch's 50 Hz imuHighRate to 20 Hz). Channel order fixed: ax,ay,az,gx,gy,gz.

is_real.meaning: P(real tracked activity). Reject as junk/fake movement if < tau.

inference.rule: If is_real < tau -> reject (no confident activity). Else activity = argmax(probs).
